nasb.text: “When you make your neighbor a loan of any sort, you shall not enter his house to take his pledge.

esv.text: “When you make your neighbor a loan of any sort, you shall not go into his house to collect his pledge.

cnv.text: “如果你借東西給你的鄰舍，不論所借的是甚麼，總不可走進他的家裡去拿抵押。

ccb.text: “如果你们借贷给同胞，不可走进他家里索取抵押物；
